sections.paragraph:
- Original: Λεββαῖος

- Transliteration: Lebbaios

- Phonetic: leb-bah'-yos

- Definition: Lebbaeus = "a man of heart"

1. one name of Jude, who was one of the twelve apostles

- Origin: of uncertain origin

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of uncertain origin; Lebbaeus a Christian: - Lebbus.
